name: Does it matter if I want this done by a team near Los Angeles or Austin?

mainEntity.name: Does it matter if I want this done by a team near Los Angeles or Austin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, local teams often want support when the project involves internal stakeholders, legacy systems, or data that sits across multiple departments. For teams in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, the key advantage of local support is faster workshops and easier access to subject-matter experts.
acceptedAnswer.description: Local support helps most when workshops, stakeholder access, or legacy-system reviews are involved.

description: Local support helps most when workshops, stakeholder access, or legacy-system reviews are involved.
